ab: Apiy, nel su moṟow?
en: Apiy, are you home?

ab: nel cu wa, awah ṟik.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Apiy, nel su moṟow?
en: Apiy, are you home?

ab: ungat moṟow Apiy wa! Iwal cu kung, amol la sikalahang su hiyan aṟ? panucan mu i moh ka hiya la.
ch: B:Apiy不在家耶!我是Iwal，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告。
en: Apiy is not at home. I am Iwal. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: ima mamu’?
en: Who are you?

ab: yaki, Sama laha ci Apiy wa, sigawahi’ min ci a’alu’!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Sama 和 Apiy，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Sama and Apiy, please open the door for us.

ab: ima?
en: Who is it?

ab: Piyu cu kung, moh cu malahan Pawanan.
en: I am Piyu, I am here for Pawan.

ab: yaki, nel cu matox sinang la ga.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: lunlungun misu caṟung la wa, buse’ su ini’ awah la.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: moh cu tikiy salahaw sinang ga.
en: I am here to play with you.

ab: buse’ cu nak palamoh sinang la, awah matatama ṟik.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: talami mani’ ka ngahi’ pinmuhi’ mu hani.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看。
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: cacibing ni’un ka ngahi’ hani.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: awah! talami’ mani ka pinnahgalan pinmuhi’ mu.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: cacibing ni’un ka pinnahgalan hani.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: tatama’! talami mani ka atiy pinmuhi’ mu aṟat pinse’en ci ayu’ kani.
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看。
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: aṟ! cacibing ni’un ka atiy hani. wa!
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: pakani’ su ci namuru’?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: pakani cu ci ringgo ini cu kani ci namuru’ kung.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: pakani su ci kamce’?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: ho’, sunkisli cu mani.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: sialit misu ci pinnahgalan aw?
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: payux aṟingu’ ka pinnahgalan hani wa, bahbah su.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: siagal misu ci use’ a’abun aw?
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: bahbah su.
en: Thank you.

ab: kapapux mani’ kay, payux tinnahuk mu ka raramat.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: aṟ! talangay ramas ni’un ramas sinkanaxan ni.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: kapayux mani’, hungel nel sani na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: aṟat cu pakasaṟux la kay!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: kapayux mani’, hungel nel sani na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: payux kine’ mu la, tana’ la wa.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
